info.title: BOB Gateway API
info.description: BOB Gateway API for Bitcoin swaps

post.description: Creates a new request, reserves the required liquidity.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Bitcoin address to calculate the maximum spendable amount for

200.description: Get the maximum spendable Bitcoin amount for the given address after accounting for estimated transaction fees

get.summary: Get all orders for a specific ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Order identifier: either the order_id returned by create-order, the source Bitcoin transaction ID , or the source EVM transaction hash

200.description: Get order by either the order_id returned by create-order, the source Bitcoin transaction ID , or the source EVM transaction hash

get.description: Checks the available liquidity and provides a quote.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to swap (in smallest unit, e.g., sats or wei)

parameters.name: gasRefill
parameters.description: Optional gas refill amount (in smallest unit, e.g., wei)

patch.summary: Register a tx for a request.
patch.description: Required for the Solver to track and execute some requests.

post.description: Creates a new request, reserves the required liquidity.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Bitcoin address to calculate the maximum spendable amount for

200.description: Get the maximum spendable Bitcoin amount for the given address after accounting for estimated transaction fees

get.summary: Get all orders for a specific ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Order identifier: either the order_id returned by create-order, the source Bitcoin transaction ID , or the source EVM transaction hash

200.description: Get order by either the order_id returned by create-order, the source Bitcoin transaction ID , or the source EVM transaction hash

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor used to fetch the next page, obtained from the response's `next_cursor`.

get.description: Checks the available liquidity and provides a quote.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to swap (in smallest unit, e.g., sats or wei)

parameters.name: gasRefill
parameters.description: Optional gas refill amount (in smallest unit, e.g., wei)

patch.summary: Register a tx for a request.
patch.description: Required for the Solver to track and execute some requests.

psbt_hex.description: Hex-encoded Bitcoin PSBT (only present when sender address was provided)

tx.description: Tx info to execute the swap
Tx info to execute the swap

GatewayError.description:
Structured error response for V1 API.
Contains an error code, human-readable message, and optional structured details.

code.description: Stable error code for frontend parsing

oneOf.description: Optional structured details specific to the error type

GatewayErrorCode.description:
Error codes for structured error responses that the frontend can parse.
These codes are stable and should not be changed without coordinating with the frontend.

GatewayErrorCodeV2.description: Error codes for V2 API - includes all V1 codes plus new ones.

GatewayErrorDetails.description: Structured details for V1 error types.

GatewayErrorDetailsV2.description: Structured details for V2 error types - includes all V1 details plus new ones.

GatewayErrorV2.description:
Structured error response for V2 API.
Contains an error code, human-readable message, and optional structured details.

code.description: Stable error code for frontend parsing

oneOf.description: Optional structured details specific to the error type

estimatedTimeInSecs.description: Estimated time in secs to complete the Order
Estimated time in secs to complete the Order
Estimated time in secs to complete the Order
Estimated time in secs to complete the Order

executionFees.description: Cost to execute the onramp on-chain

signedQuoteData.description: The signed quote data to be used in create-order

RouteInfo.description: API response type for route information.
